UPDATE interneBetriebsdatenHistorie SET anlNrIMw = ' ' , zeitintervallAnl = '2', einheitAnl = '2', notizBdeIMw = 'hello testing update 4444', bemerkung = 'hello testing update 4444 update', gueltigVon = '10-2011', gueltigBis = '-', startDate = '10-2008', endDate = '11-2018' , ending = '1' WHERE mstID = '78' AND histID = '3'
